name: IdsEdwHedisMesrDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: with cte0 as (select HEDIS_MESR_SK, HEDIS_MESR_NM, HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.HEDIS_MESR where LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) select cte0.HEDIS_MESR_SK as HEDIS_MESR_SK, cte0.HEDIS_MESR_NM as HEDIS_MESR_NM, cte0.HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM as HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, cte0.HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID as HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, cte0.SRC_SYS_CD as SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte0.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK from cte0
